Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Page.Requests.PollAlternative

Represents a single voting option within a poll. Contains the identifier and display text for each selectable alternative.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
AlternativeId

The unique identifier for this poll alternative.

 integer

None.
Text

The display text shown to users for this voting option.

 string

None.
